fields.label: Full Name

validation.message: Full name must be at least 3 characters long.

fields.conversationalPrompt: What is your full legal name as per your documents?

fields.label: Email Address

validation.message: Please enter a valid email address.

fields.conversationalPrompt: Great! Which email address should we use to send your admission updates?

fields.label: 12th Board Exam Result

validation.message: Please upload a clear scan of your marksheet (PDF or Image, max 5MB).

fields.label: 12th Board Total Marks

validation.message: Please enter your total marks out of 600.

fields.conversationalPrompt: I've received your marksheet! To verify, please tell me your exact total marks out of 600.
